// data.js
export const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Neon Nights",
    category: "Web Design",
    image: "https://blog.tubikstudio.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/posters-application-ecommerce-design-tubik.jpg",
    description: "A cyberpunk-inspired web experience",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/neon-nights",
    demo: "https://neon-nights-demo.com"
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Quantum Leap",
    category: "Mobile App",
    image: "/images/quantum-leap.jpg",
    description: "Next-gen fitness tracking app",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/quantum-leap",
    demo: "https://quantum-leap-demo.com"
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "Mindscape",
    category: "UI/UX",
    image: "/images/mindscape.jpg",
    description: "Intuitive interface for mental health app",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/mindscape",
    demo: "https://mindscape-demo.com"
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "Eco Pulse",
    category: "Branding",
    image: "/images/eco-pulse.jpg",
    description: "Brand identity for sustainable tech startup",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/eco-pulse",
    demo: "https://eco-pulse-demo.com"
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: "Cyber Sentinel",
    category: "Web Development",
    image: "/images/cyber-sentinel.jpg",
    description: "Advanced cybersecurity dashboard",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/cyber-sentinel",
    demo: "https://cyber-sentinel-demo.com"
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: "Astro Guide",
    category: "Mobile App",
    image: "/images/astro-guide.jpg",
    description: "AR-powered stargazing companion",
    github: "https://github.com/yourusername/astro-guide",
    demo: "https://astro-guide-demo.com"
  },
];
